full_text:
King Cheng of Zhou [Ji Song] 周成王[姬誦]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Cheng of Zhou [Ji Song] (周成王[姬誦]). Child emperor at the onset of the Zhou dynasty. Governed by the Duke of Zhou. King Cheng of Zhou [Ji Song] was an historic figure affiliated with Zhou Dynasty.
